dietary_options.vegetarian: Extensive vegetarian options available across all categories.
dietary_options.non_vegetarian: Wide range including chicken, mutton, lamb, prawns, fish, lobster.
dietary_options.jain: Jain food options available on request.

bar.note: No in-house brewery. We serve a curated selection of the best brands.
bar.offerings: All spirits, cocktails, mocktails, wines, beers (domestic and imported), and non-alcoholic beverages.

menu_note: Prices are base prices before taxes (GST applies). Food menu items and prices from official Akan Brewing Co backup dated 5th March. Alcohol/drinks prices from official online menu. When a customer asks for the menu, ALWAYS list items with prices. Do NOT just send the link. For alcohol, prices shown are for 30ml peg or bottle as indicated. Bottle service available for all spirits.

bar_info.description: Akan Brewing Co features a fully stocked bar with premium spirits, wines, cocktails, and beers.
bar_info.serving_sizes: Spirits available in 30ml peg or full bottle. Wines by glass (150ml) or bottle (750ml). Beer in 330ml or 500ml.
bar_info.happy_hours: Check with staff for current happy hour offers.
bar_info.note: All alcohol prices are subject to applicable taxes. Legal drinking age (21+) applies. Please drink responsibly.
